summary: Phase E1 - Editorial Context Signals Transparency: Completed comprehensive backend testing of sport-aware signal aggregation, catalog completeness, and E2E integration. All 7 tests passed after fixing a critical bug in analyst_engine.py where pipeline metadata was being overwritten.

critical_bugs.issue: pipeline_meta was overwriting _pipeline dict, causing editorial_signal_aggregation metadata to be lost
critical_bugs.impact: Pipeline metadata for signal aggregation was not being persisted in API responses
critical_bugs.fix_applied: Changed line 1987 to merge editorial_signal_aggregation into pipeline_meta before assignment

passed_tests: Catalog completeness: 33 signals with sport-aware filtering (football: 30, basketball: 29, baseball: 30 applicable codes)
Signal contract shape: All 89 signal instances validated with required fields (code, label, severity, category, signal_type, explanation, impact, confidence)

Sport-aware filtering (CRITICAL): RED_CARD_CONTEXT dropped for baseball, CORNER_VOLUME_DETECTED dropped for basketball, PACE_OVER_SIGNAL dropped for football, PITCHER_DUEL_SIGNAL dropped for basketball, editorial signals work for all sports
aggregate_signals_for_payload unit test: Correctly filters signals by sport (football includes corners, basketball drops corners, baseball drops red cards and includes pitcher signals)
build_signal_summary: Correctly aggregates counts by signal_type, category, and severity
E2E baseball analysis: POST /api/analysis/run with sport=baseball returns editorial_signal_summary and editorial_context_signals on all entries, no football-only signals present
Auth regression: demo@valuebet.app / demo1234 login still works

critical_validations: RED_CARD_CONTEXT returns None for baseball (football-only signal)
CORNER_VOLUME_DETECTED returns None for basketball (football-only signal)
PACE_OVER_SIGNAL returns None for football (basketball-only signal)
PITCHER_DUEL_SIGNAL returns None for basketball (baseball-only signal)
EDITORIAL_INJURY_NOTE works for all sports (ALL_SPORTS signal)
EDITORIAL_MARKET_SUGGESTION works for all sports (ALL_SPORTS signal)

validations: editorial_context_signals field exists on all entries (picks, discarded_motivation, discarded_market)
No football-only signals (RED_CARD, CORNER) in baseball response
No basketball-only signals (PACE_OVER) in baseball response

signal_counts.note: 0 signals is valid - depends on match data available

bugs_fixed_during_testing.description: The line `parsed['_pipeline'] = pipeline_meta` was overwriting the entire _pipeline dict, causing the editorial_signal_aggregation metadata (set on line 1976) to be lost
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to `pipeline_meta.update(parsed.get('_pipeline', {})); parsed['_pipeline'] = pipeline_meta` to merge instead of overwrite
bugs_fixed_during_testing.impact: HIGH - Pipeline metadata for signal aggregation was not being persisted
bugs_fixed_during_testing.verification: Re-ran E2E test after fix, editorial_signal_aggregation now present in response

regression_checks.note: E2E test did not verify carryover metadata presence - would need prior run to test
Baseball analysis completed without sport_not_supported error

notes: All critical sport-aware filtering validations passed
Signal catalog is complete with 33 codes as specified
E2E integration working correctly after bug fix
0 signals in E2E test is expected - depends on available match data and whether signals fire
Frontend testing was skipped per testing_type='backend only(skip frontend)' in review request
